cover.script: Dispatch release notes. Five updates this time, from faster loading to a smarter search bar.

slides.title: The Range Comes With You
slides.body: Switch from Calendar to Map and the window carries across: the week you were reading stays the week you see, with the same jobs in the queue.
slides.script: Switch from the calendar to the map, and the dates you were looking at come along with you.

slides.title: Lighter and Faster
slides.script: The app is now seven megabytes smaller, and the board loads twice as fast.

slides.title: Search by Technician
slides.script: Type a technician's name or a job and a time, right into the search bar.

slides.title: A Cleaner Queue
slides.script: The queue looks different now. Here is the old view, and here is the new one.

slides.title: Also Fixed

gridItems.description: Pins no longer vanish when you zoom out past the city level
Photos you send now show up for the office right away
Dragging a job no longer flashes it back to its old spot
Signing in on a new phone remembers you correctly

slides.script: And a handful of small fixes, from steadier map pins to smoother photo sharing in chat.

outro.headline: Dispatch News
outro.subline: Full release notes at the link below.
outro.script: Thanks for watching. Full notes at the link below.
